product_overview: Backend REST API to manage system users, technician maintenance requests, and part-requests including approval workflows. Provides authenticated endpoints for CRUD user operations and maintenance/part request listing and status changes.
core_goals: Provide secure, authenticated CRUD operations for system users with role assignment.
Expose endpoints to list and manage active maintenance requests and pending part requests for technicians and administrators.
Support an approval workflow for part requests (approve/reject) with clear success and error responses.
Keep API behavior explicit and predictable: clear success responses, validation errors, and authentication failures.
Enable integration with front-end clients through simple JSON endpoints and consistent status semantics.

features.name: User Management API
features.description: Create and update system users (admin-level operations). Endpoints require a valid auth token and accept JSON payloads for user creation and role updates.
user_flows: POST /api/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body { "username": "tech1", "password": "StrongPass!", "role": "technician" } -> Receive 200 with { "success": true }
POST /api/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body missing required fields (e.g. no password) -> Receive 400 with { "error": "validation message" }
POST /api/users with no Authorization header and body { "username": "tech1", "password": "x", "role": "technician" } -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
PUT /api/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body { "p_id": 42, "role": "manager" } -> Receive 200 with { "success": true }
PUT /api/users with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body with invalid p_id (e.g. { "p_id": 9999, "role": "manager" }) -> Receive 400 with { "error": "user not found or invalid id" }
PUT /api/users with no Authorization header and body { "p_id": 42, "role": "manager" } -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Maintenance Requests API
features.description: List active maintenance requests, list pending part requests, and approve/reject part requests. All endpoints require authentication.
user_flows: GET /api/maintenance with Authorization: Bearer <tech-or-admin-token> -> Receive 200 with Array of MaintenanceRequest
GET /api/maintenance with no Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/maintenance/part-requests with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> -> Receive 200 with Array of PartRequest (pending requests)
GET /api/maintenance/part-requests with an expired/invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/maintenance/part-requests/status with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body { "requestId": 10, "action": "approve" } -> Receive 200 with { "success": true }
POST /api/maintenance/part-requests/status with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body { "requestId": 10, "action": "reject" } -> Receive 200 with { "success": true }
POST /api/maintenance/part-requests/status with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body { "requestId": 10, "action": "invalid-action" } -> Receive 400 with { "error": "invalid action" }
POST /api/maintenance/part-requests/status with no Authorization header and body { "requestId": 10, "action": "approve" } -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/maintenance/part-requests/status with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> and body { "requestId": 10, "action": "approve" } -> Receive 200 with { "success": true } -> GET /api/maintenance/part-requests with Authorization: Bearer <admin-token> -> Receive 200 with Array of PartRequest reflecting updated status for requestId 10

features.name: User Management API
features.description: CRUD operations and authentication for system users

features.name: Maintenance Requests API
features.description: Operations for handling technician maintenance and part requests
